pred_reason: SWC-101 applies due to the absence of reentrancy guards and CEI pattern violations despite external calls being present. SWC-107 is relevant because the contract lacks zero-address checks in critical setters, allowing potential assignment to invalid addresses. Evidence: Lacks nonReentrant modifiers and CEI pattern (Finding 6); External calls identified in wind_down_epoch, erc_sweep, hourly_strategy (Finding 2); Missing zero-address checks in setters like set_governance (Finding 11)

SWC-107 is relevant because the contract lacks zero-address checks in critical setters, allowing potential assignment to invalid addresses. Evidence: Lacks nonReentrant modifiers and CEI pattern (Finding 6); External calls identified in wind_down_epoch, erc_sweep, hourly_strategy (Finding 2); Missing zero-address checks in setters like set_governance (Finding 11)
